remaining_tasks.name: Plan Phase 3: AI IOC Extraction — /gsd-plan-phase 3 (parallel track, depends on Phase 1 only)
Obtain AlienVault OTX free API key (needed before Phase 2 execution)

human_actions_pending.action: Obtain AlienVault OTX free API key from otx.alienvault.com (free account)
human_actions_pending.context: Required for FEED-03 in Phase 2 execution. Planning can proceed without it. Key goes in .env as OTX_API_KEY. The feed-orchestrator will skip OTX gracefully if key is absent (advisory behavior locked in CONTEXT.md D-07).

decisions.decision: Feed health stored in Redis hash keys: tim:feed_status:{feed_name}
decisions.rationale: Redis already deployed; pure background worker pattern; no FastAPI/port needed on feed-orchestrator; dashboard reads Redis directly in Phase 6

decisions.decision: Feed status fields: last_run, ioc_count, status (ok/error/running/never_run/disabled), error_msg
decisions.rationale: Minimal set sufficient for Phase 6 feed health panel

decisions.decision: Feed download failure: retry 3x exponential backoff (30s→60s→120s), then skip with status=error
decisions.rationale: Handles transient network blips; APScheduler native retry; other feeds unaffected

decisions.decision: pycti insertion failure: same 3x backoff, then skip. Lost IOCs acceptable for demo scope.
decisions.rationale: Next scheduled run re-downloads; no persistent buffer needed

decisions.decision: Run all feeds immediately on container startup, then schedule on cadences
decisions.rationale: Demo requires IOCs in OpenCTI within minutes; otherwise wait up to 6h for OTX first tick

decisions.decision: OTX_API_KEY absent: log warning, mark Redis status=disabled, skip OTX, run other 4 feeds
decisions.rationale: Graceful degradation; service starts cleanly before key is obtained

decisions.decision: STIX scope: indicator SDOs only. Malware family names in labels field.
decisions.rationale: FEED-01 through FEED-06 do not require malware SDOs; intel-extractor Phase 3 owns enrichment

decisions.decision: Confidence weights: Feodo=30, OTX=25, ThreatFox=20, URLhaus=15, MalwareBazaar=15
decisions.rationale: Tiered by source curation quality; higher signal feeds get higher weight

next_action: Run /gsd-plan-phase 2 to plan Feed Ingestion Pipeline. Optionally run /gsd-discuss-phase 3 first to gather context for Phase 3 before planning it in parallel.
context_notes: Session closed at a clean boundary. Phase 2 context is fully gathered and committed (02-CONTEXT.md + 02-DISCUSSION-LOG.md). All 8 key decisions are locked in CONTEXT.md. No uncommitted work. Phase 3 (AI IOC Extraction) is also unblocked and can be discussed/planned in the same next session. The OTX API key is the only pending human action — non-blocking for planning, needed before execution of the OTX feed task.
